title: 'Dismantling Hezbollah': IDF bodycam footage captures night operations in Lebanon - watch video
summary_full: Israeli forces conducted targeted night operations in South Lebanon. They dismantled Hezbollah terrorist infrastructure and command centers. The IDF stated these strikes aimed to protect northern Israel's residents. Measures were taken to minimize civilian harm. The military reported eliminating several commanders and dismantling numerous command centers.
